title: Elytra Accessory
description: Allows you to equip Elytras in an accessory slot
body:
# Elytra Accessory

**This mod requires the [Ohmega API mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ohmega)**

Allows you to equip Elytras in an accessory slot

Contains a built-in data-pack that adds a custom Elytra Accessory Type

***

The 1.20.1 version is currently deprecated and may have a few bugs. Please wait until the mod is updated if you want to have a smooth experience on 1.20.1
